tests.scenario: Sleepcast audio persists through screen lock
steps: Start a Sleepcast on Android and lock device within 10 seconds
Wait 5 minutes without unlock
Listen for audio after unlocking
tests.expected_result: Audio has been playing continuously during the device lock period and is still audible on unlock.

tests.scenario: Foreground service prevents background audio kill
steps: Start a Sleepcast
Open task manager and attempt to swipe away the Headspace app
Return to Headspace
tests.expected_result: Audio continues playing even after the task manager attempt to close the app; a foreground service icon should be visible in the status bar.

tests.scenario: Ambient audio continues after Sleepcast narration ends
steps: Start a Sleepcast with no sleep timer set
Allow the narration to complete
Listen for the next 5 minutes
tests.expected_result: Ambient background audio continues to loop or play continuously after the narration portion of the Sleepcast has ended; no silence gap of more than 2 seconds.

tests.scenario: Audio does not click or restart when looping
steps: Let a Sleepcast ambient section loop at least once
Listen carefully at the loop point
tests.expected_result: The loop transition is seamless with no audible click, gap, or volume spike at the loop boundary.

tests.scenario: Sleep timer stops within tolerance of configured time
steps: Configure sleep timer to 30 minutes
Record the exact time audio starts
Monitor for exact stop time
tests.expected_result: Audio stops between 30 minutes and 30 minutes 30 seconds after starting, and does not stop before 29 minutes 30 seconds.

tests.scenario: Sleep timer fade-out audible before silence
steps: Set sleep timer to 10 minutes
Listen at the 10-minute mark
tests.expected_result: A 30-second gradual volume fade is audible before audio reaches complete silence; no abrupt cutoff.

tests.scenario: Post-beginner home screen shows Continue Your Journey
steps: Complete the 10-day Basics course
Open the home screen and look for progression guidance
tests.expected_result: A Continue your journey or similar section appears on the home screen containing at least 3 intermediate-level courses.

tests.scenario: Progression courses are tagged as intermediate
steps: Complete the Basics course and observe the suggested next courses
Check the label or tag on each suggested course
tests.expected_result: Each suggested next course in the post-completion section carries an intermediate label or equivalent difficulty indicator.

tests.scenario: Every session has an About section with technique description
steps: Open 5 different meditation sessions across different courses
Locate the About or Why this works section on each session detail page
tests.expected_result: All 5 sessions have a visible About section containing a 2-4 sentence description of the meditation technique and its evidence basis.

tests.scenario: About section visible before session begins
steps: Open a session detail page and read the About section without starting the session
tests.expected_result: The About section is visible on the session detail screen prior to the user tapping Play, requiring no additional navigation.

tests.scenario: In-app notification sent within 24 hours of guest teacher pack launch
steps: Monitor the Headspace app on the day a new guest teacher pack is published
Check the notification inbox within 24 hours of the announced launch
tests.expected_result: An in-app notification appears announcing the new guest teacher pack within 24 hours of its publication date.

tests.scenario: New guest pack appears in home screen New section
steps: Open Headspace on the day a guest teacher pack is released
Check the home screen for a New from Headspace or similar section
tests.expected_result: The new guest teacher pack is visible in a New from Headspace section on the home screen on the day of release.

tests.scenario: Free trial lasts at least 14 days before billing
steps: Register a new account and start the free trial
Note the trial start date
Verify that no charge is made within the first 14 days
tests.expected_result: No payment is charged to the user's card within the first 14 days of the trial start date.

tests.scenario: Sleep, Meditation, and Focus categories accessible during trial
steps: During the free trial period attempt to access content in Sleep, Meditation, and Focus categories
tests.expected_result: At least one session in each of the three categories plays without a paywall or subscription prompt appearing.

tests.scenario: Renewal notification received 7 days before billing
steps: Identify the upcoming subscription renewal date
Check push notifications exactly 7 days before that date
tests.expected_result: A push notification is present containing the renewal date, the charge amount, and a deep-link to the subscription management screen.

tests.scenario: Deep-link in notification opens subscription management
steps: Tap the renewal reminder notification
Observe where the app navigates
tests.expected_result: Tapping the notification opens the Headspace subscription management screen directly without any intermediate navigation step.

tests.scenario: Session history fully restored on new device within 3 minutes
steps: Record total session count and streak on original device
Factory reset original device or use a different device
Sign in to Headspace and wait 3 minutes
tests.expected_result: The new device shows the exact same session count and streak value as the original device, restored within 3 minutes of sign-in.

tests.scenario: Course progress restored on new device
steps: Complete 5 of 10 sessions in a course on the original device
Sign in on a new device
Navigate to the same course
tests.expected_result: Course shows 5 of 10 sessions completed, matching the state on the original device.

tests.scenario: Streak restoration request accepted in-app
steps: Navigate to Help or Support in app settings
Submit a streak restoration request with the server incident date
Wait for a response
tests.expected_result: A confirmation message is received acknowledging the request, and a response or resolution is provided within 5 business days.

tests.scenario: Streak value correct after support restoration
steps: Complete the streak restoration request process
Verify the streak counter after support confirms resolution
tests.expected_result: Streak counter displays the value from before the server incident that caused the incorrect decrement.

tests.scenario: Stressed mood check-in promotes stress content to top 2
steps: Complete the mood check-in selecting stressed or anxious
Observe the top 2 items in the daily recommendation section
tests.expected_result: Both of the top 2 recommended items are tagged as relevant for stress or anxiety.

tests.scenario: Tired mood produces different top recommendations than energised mood
steps: Report tired in one session mood check-in and note the top recommendation
In a subsequent session report energised and note the top recommendation
tests.expected_result: The top recommended item differs between the tired session and the energised session, demonstrating mood-driven personalisation.

tests.scenario: Grief category contains at least 15 sessions
steps: Navigate to the Grief or Loss content category
Count all distinct sessions listed
tests.expected_result: At least 15 sessions with unique titles are present in the Grief category.

tests.scenario: ADHD Focus category contains at least 15 sessions
steps: Navigate to the ADHD Focus or Focus content category
Count all listed sessions
tests.expected_result: At least 15 distinct sessions are available in the ADHD Focus category.

tests.scenario: Content request submission acknowledged immediately
steps: Navigate to Settings > Request Content (or equivalent)
Submit a topic suggestion such as Grief for Children
tests.expected_result: A confirmation screen appears immediately acknowledging the submission and stating a review timeline of within 2 weeks.

tests.scenario: Content request form is reachable from settings
steps: Open Headspace and navigate to Settings
Search for a Request Content, Suggest a Topic, or Feedback option
tests.expected_result: A content request or suggestion option is visible in the Settings menu and opens a submission form.

tests.scenario: Background audio plays for 30 minutes while using another app
steps: Start a 30-minute guided meditation in Headspace
Switch to a browser and browse normally for 30 minutes
Return to Headspace
tests.expected_result: Headspace audio has been playing for the full 30 minutes; playback position is at or near the end of the session.

tests.scenario: Background service visible in Android status bar while playing
steps: Start a Headspace audio session on Android
Background the app by pressing Home
tests.expected_result: A foreground service notification for Headspace is visible in the status bar while audio is playing in the background.
